name: Joel Skinner
transactions: June 5, 1979:Drafted by thePittsburgh Piratesin the37th roundof the 1979 amateur draft.
February 2, 1982:Chosen by theChicago White Soxfrom thePittsburgh Piratesas a Free Agent compensation pick.

July 30, 1986:Traded by theChicago White SoxwithRon KittleandWayne Tollesonto theNew York Yankeesfor a player to be named later,Ron HasseyandCarlos Martínez. TheNew York YankeessentBill Lindsey(December 24, 1986) to theChicago White Soxto complete the trade.
March 19, 1989:Traded by theNew York YankeeswithTurner Wardto theCleveland IndiansforMel Hall.
